channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Fly tipping in the recycling area of Mill Road Car Park, 17th May
item.description:
Pallets, large cooking oil containers cardboard etc have all been dumped in the recycling area located in Mill Road Car Park Northumberland Heath. There is so much of it the recycling bins are not accessible.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bexley Road, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned barbeque and bulky goods, 17th May
item.description:
Quite a few bulky items have appeared overnight, could potentially block the pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Albion Grove, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 43 donaldson road, 17th May
item.description:
Construction fly tip outside 43 donaldson road
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Hartland Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Medium - Up to medium size van load

item.title: Tree suckers and pavement weeds, 17th May
item.description:
Lime tree suckers at base need pruning as obstructing footpath and attracting litter and dog fouling. Whole road has weeds along pavement and boundary walls. Hedges overgrown and obstructing footpath.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Morton Road, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Someone has left a bottle of urine in the street, 17th May
item.description:
Frequently Uber drivers parking up and leaving bottles of urine on the roadway
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 19-23, White Lion Street, Barnsbury, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Horse poo, 17th May
item.description:
Yesterday (16/5/26) several horses where 'parked up' while the owners went into the chequers pub. However the horse poo was left and is over several different parts of the pavement from outside the pub all the way over to the shops leading up to the fairway. It's on the pavements so could easily be stepped in and absolutely stinks. I just walked over the budgens with my two pound children and we had to avoid at least three piles of the poo.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 177, Southborough Lane, Bickley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Drug paraphernalia, 17th May
item.description:
Drug paraphernalia

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manton Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car "abandoned" on the pavement on a zebra crossing., 17th May
item.description:
This car is blocking the footpath and the zebra crossing. Wheelchair users and buggies/prams are forced to go on the road as access to both the footpath and the zebra crossing are blocked by this vehicle. This is a continuing problem.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 153, Brook Street, Northumberland Heath, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Trolley, 17th May
item.description:
Abandoned trolley and rubbish

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Manton Road, Abbey Wood
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lots of bags fly tipped on road and pavement, 17th May
item.description:
Its in the road and on pavement

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wernbrook Street, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Litter all over the street, 17th May
item.description:
Just walked down the high street and there is litter everywhere which is blowing everywhere. This is getting worse, there needs to be a solution for the rubbish outside the shops and flats, it is like this everyday.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): High Street, Penge, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bins left outside open, 17th May
item.description:
All over the pavement...

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Charlton Church Lane, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Overflow bins, 17th May
item.description:
Wellington gardens - overflowing bins

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Wellington Gardens, Charlton
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 103 victoria road, 17th May
item.description:
Fly tipping 103 victoria road

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Victoria Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
item.category: Fly-tip Small - Less than one bag

item.title: Seriously? Again? EVERY SINGLE SUNDAY!!, 17th May
item.description:
How can we resolve this? It’s really unfair that the residents of Pellerin Road have to put up with this every Sunday. The commercial waste bags with Micky’s chippy waste from Saturday is too tempting for pigeons and foxes. The flimsy plastic bags are shit

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Pellerin Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Weeds, tree suckers and hedge obstructing pavement, 17th May
item.description:
Overgrown hedge and tree suckers are blocking the pavement and collecting rubbish. The pavements need weeding and sweeping.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 41, Morton Road, Islington, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.description:

item.title: Even more rubbish dumped outside number 11, 17th May
item.description:
Again more rubbish has been dumped outside flats 11 with food rubbish all across the path. Please clear but also stop this from happening again and again, clearly from the high turnover of these flats.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 7, Nelgarde Road, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet
